pre_registration.rationale: Window (0.10, 0.90) fixed a priori. Selection uses H-arm only — independent of A-arm contrast. Calibration run verifies natural headroom; window not adjusted post-hoc.
pre_registration.analysis_plan: Per-scenario H mean (avg over seeds × paraphrases); keep cell iff H in (hr_lo, hr_hi); per-model Wilcoxon one-sided (A>H) on matched scenario pairs; Stouffer combine across models; permutation test (10,000 shuffles within-pair); linear mixed-effects: leak ~ frame + (1+frame|scenario) + (1|model).
